query:
SELECT u.name as corretor, COUNT(c.id) as contratos, SUM(CAST(c.valorVenda AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as vgv
FROM contratos c
JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
WHERE MONTH(c.createdAt) = 2 AND YEAR(c.createdAt) = 2026 AND c.distrato = 0
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
ORDER BY contratos DESC, vgv DESC
LIMIT 10;
